subcodes.first_line: O leaf, stirred by the fragrant breeze of these gardens! If outwardly that handmaid of God hath until now [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه المهتزه من نسیم هذه الریاض اگر بظاهر بان امة الله تا بحال چیزی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @immateriality; ineffability of soul; spirit, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
